modules.name: 基础评估
modules.description: 对设施环境、营养、行为、健康、疼痛与压力管理、安乐死的基础评估
modules.descriptionEn: Basic assessment of facility environment, nutrition, behavior, health, pain and stress management, and euthanasia

modules.name: 进阶评估
modules.description: 对动物运输、实验设计与操作、人员投入、福利伦理规定的进阶评估
modules.descriptionEn: Advanced assessment of animal transportation, experimental design and operation, personnel, and welfare ethics regulations

modules.name: 异常动物（小鼠）评估
modules.description: 评分标准：1分为严重；2分为轻微；3分为未勾选此项默认为3分。
modules.descriptionEn: Scoring criteria: 1 = Severe; 2 = Mild; 3 = Normal (default if not checked).
